hooks.name: Quality Review on Agent Stop
hooks.description: When the agent finishes a task, review all changes for code quality — duplicates, logic errors, missing error handling, naming. Fix blocking issues immediately. Stay silent if everything is clean.

action.prompt:
You just finished a task. Before the developer commits, do a code quality review of all the files you created or modified in this session. Use getDiagnostics and read the changed files if needed.

Check for:
- Duplicated code across files that should be shared
- Logic errors, off-by-one, missing edge cases
- Missing error handling (try/catch, unhandled promises)
- Inconsistent naming conventions with the codebase
- Code that contradicts existing patterns

Do NOT check for missing tests — a separate test generation agent handles that.

If you find a blocking issue (duplicate code, logic bug, missing error handling), fix it immediately. If you notice minor suggestions, mention them briefly. If everything is clean, say nothing — do not output confirmation messages.
